name: ingest-whatsapp-nightly
_fix_notes: 1. LIMIT 5 removed from channel query
2. SQL alias changed to access_token (plaintext) — rename column in DB or add decryption if truly encrypted
3. Base URL corrected from graph.instagram.com to graph.facebook.com
4. Endpoint changed to /analytics (aggregate counts) — /messages GET bulk listing does not exist in WhatsApp Cloud API
5. Auth moved to Authorization Bearer header
6. Date range params added: granularity DAY, rolling 1-day window for nightly batch
7. Merge node (Init - Channel State) preserves channel_id after HTTP call
8. Transform rewritten for analytics response shape (pre-aggregated, no per-message iteration)
9. WhatsApp-specific columns (sent_count, delivered_count, read_count, failed_count) added to DB insert
10. platform field added to DB insert
11. Upsert (ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE) replaces plain insert
12. Error path logs failure separately; success log only fires on verified success
13. active left false — flip to true after testing
IMPORTANT: The /analytics endpoint requires your Meta app to have whatsapp_business_management permission.
Ensure your WABA token has this scope before activating.
Also add columns sent_count, delivered_count, read_count, failed_count to post_metrics table:
ALTER TABLE post_metrics ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sent_count INT DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE post_metrics ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS delivered_count INT DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE post_metrics ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS read_count INT DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE post_metrics ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failed_count INT DEFAULT 0;

parameters.query: SELECT id AS channel_id, account_id, access_token FROM channels WHERE platform = 'whatsapp' AND connected_status = 'connected';

INSERT INTO post_metrics (
  channel_id, platform, metric_date,
  reach, impressions, engagements, clicks,
  likes, comments, shares, saves,
  video_views, watch_time_seconds, profile_visits, follower_count,
  sent_count, delivered_count, read_count, failed_count,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.metric_date }}',
  {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.engagements }}, {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.likes }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.video_views }}, {{ $json.watch_time_seconds }}, {{ $json.profile_visits }}, {{ $json.follower_count }},
  {{ $json.sent_count }}, {{ $json.delivered_count }}, {{ $json.read_count }}, {{ $json.failed_count }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (channel_id, metric_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  reach            = EXCLUDED.reach,
  impressions      = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  engagements      = EXCLUDED.engagements,
  sent_count       = EXCLUDED.sent_count,
  delivered_count  = EXCLUDED.delivered_count,
  read_count       = EXCLUDED.read_count,
  failed_count     = EXCLUDED.failed_count,
  created_at       = EXCLUDED.created_at;

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'success',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-whatsapp-nightly", metrics_count: $input.all().length }) }}',
  now());

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'failure',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-whatsapp-nightly", error: $json.error }) }}',
  now());
